buildCommand: pnpm --filter ./apps/morning-bites build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const src=path.resolve('apps/morning-bites/dist/public'); const dest=path.resolve('public'); if (!fs.existsSync(src)) { console.error('Missing build output at ' + src); process.exit(1); } fs.rmSync(dest,{recursive:true,force:true}); fs.cpSync(src,dest,{recursive:true}); console.log('Prepared Vercel output at ' + dest);"
